entity.summary: Avalanche decentralized exchange and liquidity protocol using concentrated and legacy AMM pools, swaps, farming, voting, incentives, and on-chain routing contracts.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies Pharaoh as an active Avalanche-native concentrated-liquidity exchange with a public application, swap guides, liquidity and farming workflows, voting, incentives, and published deployed contracts. No exact launch date, legal jurisdiction, predecessor, successor, or terminal lifecycle fact is asserted.

evidence.title: Pharaoh Exchange official documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes Pharaoh as an Avalanche-native liquidity and trading protocol with concentrated liquidity, swaps, liquidity provision, farming, voting, and incentives.

evidence.title: Pharaoh deployed contract addresses
evidence.notes: Current first-party contract registry publishes active factories, routers, swap routers, position management, quoters, gauges, voting, and related Avalanche contracts used by Pharaoh Exchange.
